data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) security faces threat from advancing quantum computing technology, warns experts.
data.description: The continuous progress in quantum computing technology is causing apprehension regarding its potential effect on the security of Bitcoin and blockchain. Experts are raising concerns about the security of CoinMarketCap and its impact on digital currencies as quantum computing continues to advance.

data.title: Coinbase CEO optimistic on passing key crypto legislation by year-end, saying bipartisan support is strong, "we're 90% there."
data.description: Coinbase Global Inc. CEO Brian Armstrong is optimistic about cryptocurrency regulations in the U.S., stating that both Democrats and Republicans are aligned on the issue. Despite the government shutdown, momentum for market structure legislation is high, with Armstrong mentioning that they are 90% there in terms of agreement. He expressed confidence in a bill being passed by the end of the year and getting it out of Committee by Thanksgiving. Armstrong affirmed Coinbase's commitment to advocating for the future of crypto on Capitol Hill. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Xlence to be Gold Sponsor at iFX EXPO ASIA 2025 in Hong Kong on Oct 26-28. Meet team and see platform enhancements.
data.description: Discover the latest upgrades to the platform and get to know the team from October 26 to 28 at ASIAWORLD EXPO Hall 2 in Dubai, UAE. Xlence has proudly announced its role as a Gold Sponsor at the iFX EXPO ASIA 2025 in Hong Kong. This significant event brings together industry professionals including brokers, prop firms, introducing brokers, and fintech companies.

data.title: Products like cars, toys, and tea are set to increase in price due to tariffs impacting corporate profits.
data.description: The prices of various consumer goods like cars, toys, and tea are anticipated to increase due to the imposition of tariffs, affecting corporate profits.

data.title: AWS outage caused disruption for smart bed customers, leaving them sleepless. The widespread issue impacted many users.
data.description: Once again recently, a major cloud-computing provider, Amazon Web Services, experienced a significant outage affecting a large number of users. Surprisingly, this disruption impacted individuals who were simply looking to rest peacefully.

data.title: September's delayed CPI data may reveal growing price pressures due to Trump's tariffs on imports.
data.description: The inflation rate for September, as revealed recently due to the government shutdown, could illustrate the impact of President Trump's tariffs on numerous imported goods.

data.title: Warner Bros. sparking concern in Hollywood with possible sale, creating uncertainty for the industry.
data.description: The potential loss of the stand-alone studio came as a shock to many, with one producer expressing that it would be devastating.

data.title: 'AI collaboration, known as Vibecoding, simplifies app development for anyone, boosting accessibility despite trade-offs.'
data.description: Integrating artificial intelligence into coding processes can enhance accessibility for individuals with limited coding experience. However, this integration comes with certain compromises.

data.title: Negative outlook for Bitcoin in October as price stays low, prompting concerns of 'worst Uptober' in years. Bulls disappointed.
data.description: Despite a return to the top of its local trading range, Bitcoin continued to display a negative trend. This has resulted in disappointed bulls expressing concerns over what could potentially be the "worst Uptober ever". The cryptocurrency's inability to mark significant gains despite hitting local highs is causing unease among traders and analysts. As Bitcoin struggles to reverse this downward movement, conversations are circulating within the community regarding the future performance of the coin.

data.title: In 2025, Halloween candy sales reflect Americans' divided sentiments, showing a need for mild surprises amidst financial constraints.
data.description: The latest data on Halloween candy sales in the US indicate that the nation is experiencing polarization and financial constraints, with individuals seeking some small elements of surprise and delight. The sales figures reveal a clear reflection of the current sentiment among Americans.

data.title: Trump to meet Xi Jinping in South Korea next week at APEC Summit amidst trade tensions. First in-person meeting since 2nd term. U.S. Treasury Sec and Chinese Vice-Premier to meet.
data.description: President Donald Trump is set to meet with Chinese President Xi Jinping in South Korea next week as confirmed by White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt. This face-to-face meeting between the two leaders will be the first since Trump's return to office and comes amidst escalating trade tensions between the world's leading economies. The meeting is scheduled to coincide with the Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation Summit (APEC) in South Korea happening from October 31 to November 1. President Trump will engage in a bilateral meeting with President Xi on Thursday. In preparation for the meeting, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Chinese Vice-Premier He Lifeng will have their own meeting in Malaysia this week.

data.title: ZTO Express to announce Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 19, 2025. Based in China, the company is listed on NYSE: ZTO and SEHK: 2057.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, ZTO Express (Cayman) Inc. disclosed plans to reveal its unaudited financial data for the third quarter concluding in September. ZTO, a prominent express delivery firm in China, trades on NYSE under the ticker symbol ZTO and SEHK under 2057.
